name: nano-banana-marketplace
description: Nano Banana — Google Gemini 3.1 AI image generation & editing plugin for Claude Code. Supports text-to-image, inpainting, style transfer, 4K generation, search-grounded generation, and 14-image multi-reference composition.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: AI image generation & editing for Claude Code powered by Google Gemini 3.1 API. Text-to-image, inpainting, style transfer, 4K upscaling, search grounding, and multi-reference composition.
